rule: Researcher adjudications unblock prospective contracts only, reopen no historical verdict, and must be disclosed as doctrine-grounded assumptions rather than Garrido confirmations.

AF_1_advance_signal.thesis_anchor: Section 8.4 recommends a cross-functional forecasting process in advance.

binding_asymmetry.R24: planned operations; strongest defensible lead and detection
binding_asymmetry.R21: weather/natural-disaster forecast; moderate lead and skill
binding_asymmetry.R22: low-predictability threat warning; high-accuracy alarm forbidden

AF_1_advance_signal.program_s_effect: Authorizes only the separate S-P annex with per-family noisy generators; no alarm enters S-NATIVE.
